response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tooling (test runners, CI/CD, fluent-asserts), and clear leadership through workshops and open-source projects, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record of technical leadership via workshops, open-source projects, and cross-team collaboration
Broad technical stack including mobile (iOS/Apple TV), build systems, and infrastructure automation
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities
Limited demonstrated experience in mobile platform ecosystems beyond one iOS project
No mention of roadmap planning, organizational change, or strategic alignment responsibilities
